title: poa primae
intro: Poa primae, also known as the 'meadow grass', is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral compounds. The health benefits of Poa primae include reducing inflammation, treating wounds, and potentially lowering blood sugar levels. It is typically prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions for medicinal use, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
